channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Advocate for Affordable Housing, Yet Their Policies Hinder Construction
item.description: Strict environmental rules imposed by liberal leaders are obstructing new home development.

item.title: Iran Remains an Adversary, Not an Ally
item.description: Trump should avoid letting his desire to end the military conflict he started lead to unrealistic views about Iran.

item.title: A Novel Approach to Overcoming the Self-Help Trend
item.description: Rather than pursuing self-optimization, we should revisit classic stories that nurture moral imagination.

item.title: Canada's Assisted-Suicide Surge Highlights Single-Payer System's Human Toll
item.description: Long waits and limited options make euthanasia seem like a policy response to a struggling healthcare system.
